text.text: Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. Lorem Ipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text ever since the 1500s, when an unknown printer took a galley of type and scrambled it to make a type specimen book. It has survived not only five centuries, but also the leap into electronic typesetting, remaining essentially unchanged. It was popularised in the 1960s with the release of Letraset sheets containing Lorem Ipsum passages, and more recently with desktop publishing software like Aldus PageMaker including versions of Lorem Ipsum.

captioned_image.title: quality & craftsmanship
captioned_image.descriptionText: When it comes to shopping for wedding dresses, what you see is not always what you get. However, whether you purchase your gown at one of our 300+ stores or online, we guarantee that the one you receive will look just as it did when you ordered it, with the breathtaking style and highly skilled craftsmanship you paid for.

captioned_image_982017024.title: attention to detail changes
captioned_image_982017024.descriptionText: Our wedding dresses are made-to-order and hand-embellished with artisan skill, requiring as many as 100 hours of effort. Each gown is thoughtfully designed to flatter your figure and crafted with the utmost care.

captioned_image_975559966.title: ethical sourcing
captioned_image_975559966.descriptionText: Our suppliers comply with the highest degree of ethical sourcing, manufacturing, and labor practices. Read the policy..

captioned_image_1857873275.title: tried & true
captioned_image_1857873275.descriptionText: Simply put: We have your color. Our whole rainbow of shades—from sky blues to soft pinks to vivid greens and more—is tested in our color lab for consistency from dress to dress, in every setting.

captioned_image.title: Embrace Your Comfort Level
captioned_image.descriptionText:
The most important thing to remember is that finding a great fit must come first. It will be a long day, you will be quite active–color us impressed if you don't have to tackle a few more tasks after you're already dressed–and you'll pose for a lot of photos. The last thing you want is a dress that requires tugging and nudging to keep in place.

Think about what you usually feel good wearing and then take it to the next level. Do you gravitate toward form-fitting silhouettes? Why not try a trumpet gown? Does your temperature fluctuate easily? Opt for a dress with a removable jacket. Do you feel confident in trousers? How about a dressy pantsuit or a jumpsuit? Prefer a bit of give? Stretch lace and matte jersey fabrications feel almost like your go-to athleisure wear, we promise!

captioned_image_1210425452.title: Choose Your Length
captioned_image_1210425452.descriptionText:
What sort of wedding will it be? The formality of the ceremony and atmosphere of the venue will help inform the length of your dress. Having a religious ceremony, a glitzy reception, or both? Go for a formal mother of the bride dress, which usually entails a floor-length silhouette with a generous amount of sparkle. Another formal-yet-fun option is a tea-length dress, which shows off a great pair of shoes.

Most of the time, though, you can't go wrong in a knee-length mother of the bride dress and refined accessories. This will work well for a semiformal wedding (a classic dinner-cocktails-dancing affair) or at an informal gathering (an after-party celebrating a small ceremony, or a destination event).

dbi_hero_banner.text: It’s here: the event you’ve been waiting for the entire school year. Dress up for the night of your life with our amazing collection of prom dresses for 2020, featuring the hottest prom trends of the season.

text.text:
Choosing the perfect wedding dress for the day you’ve always dreamed of can seem overwhelming. We're here to help. At David’s, we know how different wedding dress styles can achieve different results, and which silhouettes can provide the most flattering fit. Let us match you with the perfect dress silhouette to help you say “I do.”

A-Line

A fair cousin to the ball gown, an A-Line Wedding Dress is fitted through the waist or hips before extending into a full skirt, creating a beautiful A-shaped silhouette. Since the skirt is less flared than a ball gown, A-Lines look lovely on all shapes and sizes

Ball Gown

This magical gown belongs to a fairytale realm. With its fitted bodice and dramatically flared skirt, it’s no wonder that many ladies dream of wearing this dress on their special day. Ball Gown Wedding Dresses are a stunning choice for most brides, but they can overwhelm a petite frame.

Mermaid

Ethereal and enchanting, a Mermaid Wedding Gown dazzles with its timeless elegance. This fitted gown hugs the length of the body before flaring out at the knees in a romantic skirt. Mermaid is a dress style best suited for slender frames or women with hourglass figures who love flaunting their curves.

Sheath

Effortlessly stunning, this bridal style provides a tailored, narrow silhouette from neckline to hem. Sheaths are traditionally lighter than their full-skirted sisters and offer a body-hugging silhouette. This gown looks best on slender, petite, and hourglass frames.

Short

Growing in popularity for casual weddings, pre-wedding events and as a second-dress option for the reception, Short Wedding Dresses bring versatility to the party. From tea-length hemlines – hitting between the knee and ankle – to knee-length and high-low styles, short bridal dresses are perfect for showing off your legs, dazzling shoes, and epic dance moves.

If you need help choosing the best bridal style for your special day, make an appointment at one of our locations. Our expert stylists can provide more guidance and inspiration to help you choose the dress of your dreams.

dbi_hero_banner.text:
Under

your wedding dress

 

Here's your guide to the best slips and shapewear for
every style of wedding dress. Choose the right ones,
and you'll instantly see why these undergarments are
a bride's best friend.

text.text:
SUMMARY: THESE MONTHLY SWEEPSTAKES ARE SPONSORED BY DAVID'S BRIDAL, INC. AND DAVID'S BRIDAL CANADA INC. (COLLECTIVELY REFERRED TO AS "SPONSOR") NO PURCHASE NECESSARY. A PURCHASE DOES NOT IMPROVE YOUR CHANCE OF WINNING. VOID WHERE PROHIBITED. The Sweepstakes starts on April 1, 2009 in the United States and on March 1, 2011 in Canada (excluding Quebec), and will run monthly until terminated by Sponsor. Each calendar month, eligible entries will be collected, and one (1) eligible winner from the United States and one eligible winner from Canada (excluding Quebec) will be selected from that month's eligible entries from the applicable region in a random drawing to be held on or about the first business day of the following month in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania, 19428 U.S.A. Non-winning eligible entries do not automatically carry forward to subsequent monthly draws. Each monthly winner will be eligible to select one of the prizes described below. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received during each calendar month.

HOW TO ENTER: To enter, log on to www.davidsbridal.com (in the U.S), or www.davidsbridal.ca (in Canada) and fill in the on-line registration form and submit it in accordance with the on-screen directions during the Sweepstakes period and you will be entered once in the Sweepstakes for that month. To enter the Sweepstakes without registering, type or hand print your first and last name, address, telephone number, email address, and age, on a 3" x 5" piece of paper or note card, and place in the mail with proper postage addressed to: David's Bridal Gown Sweepstakes - Marketing 1001 Washington Street, Conshohocken, PA 19428; or David's Bridal Canada Gown Sweepstakes - Marketing 1001 Washington Street, Conshohocken, PA 19428 U.S.A. Mailed entries must be typed or handwritten and are limited to one (1) per envelope or outer mailing.

There is a limit of one (1) entry per participant, regardless of method of entry. Subsequent entries by the same participant will not be valid. All entries become the exclusive property of the Sponsor. No entries will be acknowledged or returned. Proof of sending or submission will not be deemed to be proof of receipt by Sponsor. Sponsor is not responsible for lost, late, incomplete, invalid, unintelligible, illegible, misdirected or postage-due entries, which will be disqualified.

ELIGIBILITY: Open only to legal residents of: (i) the 50 United States, Puerto Rico and the District of Columbia, 18 years of age or older at the time of entry; and (ii) legal residents of Canada (excluding Quebec) who have reached the age of majority in their province/territory of residence at the time of entry; who are not employees (nor immediate family members and/or living in the same household of such employees) of David's Bridal Inc. (the "Sponsor"), its subsidiary or affiliated companies. For the purpose of this Sweepstakes, immediate family is defined as spouse, partner, mother, father, legal guardian, in-laws, grandmother, grandfather, brother, sister, children and grandchildren.

In the event of a dispute over the identity of an online entrant, entry will be deemed submitted by the authorized account holder of the email address submitted at the time of entry. "Authorized account holder" is defined as the person who is assigned an email address by an internet provider, online service provider, or other organization (e.g. business, educational institute, etc.) that is responsible for assigning email addresses for the domain associated with the submitted email address. Use of automated devices to enter or otherwise participate in this Sweepstakes is prohibited and will automatically result in disqualification. CAUTION: ANY ATTEMPT BY AN ENTRANT TO DELIBERATELY DAMAGE ANY WEB SITE OR UNDERMINE THE LEGITIMATE OPERATIONS OF THE SWEEPSTAKES IS A VIOLATION OF CRIMINAL AND CIVIL LAWS AND SHOULD SUCH AN ATTEMPT BE MADE, ENTRANT WILL BE AUTOMATICALLY DISQUALIFIED AND THE SPONSOR RESERVES THE RIGHT TO SEEK REMEDIES AND DAMAGES FROM ANY SUCH ENTRANT TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW.

LIMITATION OF LIABILITY: Sponsor is not responsible for any error, omission, interruption, deletion, defect, delay in operations or transmission, theft or destruction or unauthorized access to or alteration of entry materials, or for technical, network, telephone equipment, electronic, computer, hardware or software malfunctions of any kind, or inaccurate transmission of, or failure to receive entry information by Sponsor on account of technical problems or traffic congestion on the Internet or at any web site or any combination thereof. Sponsor is also not responsible for any injury or damage to entrant's or any other person's computer related to or resulting from participating in or downloading any materials in the Sweepstakes. If for any reason these Sweepstakes are not capable of running as planned, including, but not limited to, infection by computer virus, bugs, tampering, unauthorized intervention, fraud, or any other causes beyond the reasonable control of Sponsor which corrupt or affect the administration, security, fairness, integrity or proper conduct of the promotion, then Sponsor reserves the right to, at its sole discretion, cancel, terminate, modify or suspend the Sweepstakes.

By participating in the Sweepstakes, each entrant agrees to release and hold the Sponsor harmless from any and all losses, damages, rights, claims and actions of any kind in connection with or resulting from participation in the Sweepstakes and/or acceptance, possession, or use of any prizes including, without limitation, personal injuries, death, property damages and any claims by third parties or otherwise based on publicity rights, defamation, or invasion of privacy. Entrants acknowledge that Sponsor is not responsible or liable for any warranty, representation, or guarantee, express or implied, in fact or in law, relative to the prizes, except as set forth in these rules or otherwise required by law.

RESERVATIONS: Void where prohibited or restricted by law and subject to all applicable laws and regulations. All entries become the Sponsor's property and will not be returned. By entering this Sweepstakes, each entrant agrees to be bound by these rules and the decisions of the judges. Acceptance of prize constitutes the grant of an unconditional right to Sponsor to use the winner's name, voice and/or likeness for any and all publicity, advertising and promotional purposes without additional compensation, except where prohibited by law.

WINNERS: Before being declared a winner of a prize, an eligible selected entrant who is a Canadian resident will be required to correctly answer a mathematical skill testing question without mechanical or other aid to be administered by telephone or email, at a pre-arranged, mutually convenient time. All reasonable efforts will be made to contact each monthly winner. If an eligible winner does not respond to the winning notification within 7 business days (or fails to correctly answer the skill-testing question if a Canadian resident), Sponsor reserves the right to randomly select a new eligible winner from among the remaining eligible entries for that region for that month. Winners are required to prove eligibility and will be required to sign an affidavit of eligibility and release (declaration and release in Canada). The failure of a potential winner to verify eligibility, or the return of any notification as undeliverable, or the failure to return the signed affidavit and release (declaration and release in Canada) will result in disqualification and the random selection of an alternate winner from among the remaining eligible entries for that month. In the event of any other noncompliance with rules, the prize may be awarded to an alternate winner. All expenses not specifically included, are the sole responsibility of the winner. U.S. winners are responsible for all taxes on any prize awarded to them. For names of monthly winners in the United States, log on to www.davidsbridal.com/winagown. The names of the monthly winners in Canada will be available at www.davidsbridal.ca/winagown.

PRIZES: One (1) winner from the previous month's eligible entries from the United States, Puerto Rico and the District of Columbia will be selected for each month in which the Sweepstakes are underway. In addition, one (1) winner from the previous month's eligible entries from Canada (excluding Quebec) will be selected for each month in which the Sweepstakes are underway The monthly winner from the United States will receive a certificate for their choice of the following prizes carried by David's Bridal: either (i) a bridal gown chosen from the current season's David's Bridal bridal gowns, or (ii) up to five (5) dresses including bridesmaids and mother-of-the-bride dresses chosen from the current season's David's Bridal gowns. The monthly winner from Canada will receive a certificate for their choice of the following prizes carried by David's Bridal Canada: either (i) a bridal gown chosen from the current season's David's Bridal Canada bridal gowns, or (ii) up to five (5) dresses including bridesmaids and mother-of-the-bride dresses chosen from the current season's David's Bridal Canada gowns. Prize value will vary depending on the particular prize selected by the monthly winners. Alterations not included. Prize is not redeemable for cash or transferable; and no substitutions allowed except at the discretion of the Sponsor, who may substitute prizes of equal or greater value. Certificates for prizes must be redeemed within 90 days of notification that the entrant has won the monthly sweepstakes.

MISCELLANEOUS: Collection and use of personally identifiable information will be in accordance with David's Bridal Privacy Policy, as posted on the web at: /privacy or at www.davidsbridal.ca/privacy. Any disputes concerning these Sweepstakes shall be governed by the laws of the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, and any dispute that may arise hereunder shall be brought in a state or federal court in Pennsylvania.

rich_text_with_light.rteDesc:
At David's Bridal, we want every part of your wedding to run smoothly. That's why we partner with experienced vendors to deliver the perfect day you've always dreamed of. To preserve memories from your special day, browse our exclusive deals on services from professional bridal photographers, and customize a package to match your needs. You don't have to find a wedding photographer on your own - count on David's Bridal's preferred photography partners to capture every unforgettable moment.

 

How Much Is A Wedding Photographer?

Typically, wedding photographers base their prices off of experience and the services included in your specific wedding package. It's not surprising, then, that some photographers ask for well over $10,000 to capture your perfect day.

Is that number way out of your range? Let us help.

 

How To Find A Wedding Photographer

Use one of our preferred photographers for all of your bridal photography needs. Since you'll be working with a David's Bridal partner, you get an exclusive deal on your personalized wedding photography package. Check out our current partner discount to get more information about how much you'll save, plus details on your exclusive photography package.

 

Our Wedding Photographers And Videographers

They say your wedding day will go by in the blink of an eye, and it's true. To make the most of such an unforgettable day, use one of our preferred bridal photography and videography partners to capture each beautiful moment and cherish the memories forever. Professional photographers and wedding videographers know every angle and detail to focus in on, including candid moments from your walk down the aisle, the emotions on your and your partner's faces as you exchange vows, laughter and tears during wedding toasts, fun dance moves, plus stunning shots of the wedding party, venue, décor, and accessories that bring your ceremony and reception to life.

 

Wedding Photography Checklist

While you're planning your special day, we recommend talking to your photographer about specific shots you'd like to have as keepsakes. Use our handy checklist to determine which photos you'd like to have that show off your perfect day.

  • Dress on display
  • Small details, including your jewelry, décor, close-up shots of your dress, and small touches that make your dream wedding a reality
  • Quiet, private moments between you and your partner
  • Candid photos of cherished loved ones, including both partners' parents
  • Landscape shots of the venue
  • Photos of the bridesmaids and groomsmen helping the bride and groom get ready
  • Candid photos of the ring bearer and flower girl

faq_question_text.text:
Privacy Rights

Our privacy policy has changed. As of 25 May 2018, we're aligning with the European Union's new General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). We've updated our privacy policy to provide you with more information on how David’s Bridal protects your privacy, including information on how to exercise your rights to your data.

David's Bridal, Inc., a Florida corporation, David's Bridal Canada Inc., a Canadian national corporation, and their respective divisions, subsidiaries and affiliates (collectively, "David's Bridal", "we", "us", or "our") are committed to maintaining your confidence and trust. We have adopted the following privacy policy to explain our practices relating to the information we collect, and the information you provide to us, through your completion of a registration or other form in one of our retail stores, and from your visit to and use of Web sites, and other mobile applications, content and services (collectively, the "Service") we make publicly available.

text.text:
This privacy policy answers the following questions, which we believe are the questions you are most likely to have about our handling of your personal information:

A.    California Privacy Rights.

B.    What information does David's Bridal collect?

C.    How does David's Bridal use the information it collects?

D.    Will David's Bridal disclose my personal information?

E.    How can I review and revise my personal information?

F.    How can I opt-out of receiving advertising communications from David's Bridal and others?

G.    How does David's Bridal protect my personal information?

H.    Is there anything else I should know about Internet privacy?

We review this policy regularly, and make changes in connection with its review. Please check this privacy policy page periodically for changes. Your submission of a registration form or your continued use of the Service following the posting of changes to this privacy policy means that you have accepted those changes.
